name: Generate AI Video from Prompt and Upload to Google Drive
description: Takes a text prompt, uses Claude AI to generate an optimized video production brief, researches visual styles via Exa, and uploads a final project plan to Google Drive for production handoff.

source.originalName: Generate video from prompt using Vertex AI Veo 3 and upload to Google Drive

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for visual research

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for status notification

videoPrompt.description: Text prompt describing the video to generate (e.g. 'A cinematic drone shot of a coastal sunset with gentle waves')

driveFolderId.description: Google Drive folder ID to upload the production brief to

steps.name: Build Exa search query for visual reference
Research visual styles and techniques via Exa
Build Claude prompt for video production brief

code.source:
const prompt = $.input.videoPrompt;
const results = $.steps.researchStyles.response.results || [];
let references = '';
results.forEach((r, i) => { references += (i + 1) + '. ' + (r.title || r.url) + '
' + (r.text || '').slice(0, 200) + '

'; });

const aiPrompt = 'You are an expert video production director and AI video generation specialist. Create a detailed production brief based on the following prompt.

ORIGINAL PROMPT: ' + prompt + '

VISUAL REFERENCES:
' + references + '

Generate a comprehensive video production brief as JSON:
{
  "title": "short project title",
  "optimizedPrompt": "enhanced prompt with cinematic details, camera movements, lighting, mood",
  "duration": "recommended duration in seconds",
  "aspectRatio": "16:9 or 9:16 or 1:1",
  "style": "cinematic style description",
  "cameraWork": ["camera movement 1", "camera movement 2"],
  "colorPalette": ["color1", "color2", "color3"],
  "mood": "overall mood description",
  "soundtrack": "music style recommendation",
  "scenes": [{ "sceneNumber": 1, "description": "scene detail", "duration": "2s", "transition": "cut/fade/dissolve" }],
  "technicalNotes": ["note1", "note2"],
  "references": ["reference insight 1"]
}

Return ONLY valid JSON.';

return { aiPrompt };

steps.name: Generate production brief with Claude AI
Parse Claude output and strip fences
Upload production brief to Google Drive
